PRC_NOFF.description: Set of quadruples {r,p,y1,y2} such that new capacity of process p cannot be installed between the years y1 and y2 in region r [this is a switch; >0 => YES]

PRC_NSTTS.description: Set of triplets {r,p,s} such that process p is a night storage device with charging timeslices s in region r [this is a switch; >0 => YES]

PRC_PKNO.description: Set of pairs {all_r,p}such that process p cannot be used in the peaking constraints in region r [this is a switch; >0 => YES]

PRC_REACT.description: Reactance of a transmission line (must be IRE)

PRC_REFIT.description: Defines a mapping of host process prc to a retrofit or lifetime extension option p in region r, where p is another process representing the refurbishment option. The value of the parameter determines the type of the refurbishment option (see column on the left).
PRC_REFIT.units_ranges_defaults: Dimensionless  [1,3];   default value: none  Default i/e: n/a
PRC_REFIT.instances_conditions: Requires that early retirements are allowed in the model. The parameter value determines the type of the refurbishment option as follows: ·     Value=(±1 mod 2): Technology p will be a lifetime extension option (+1), or a retrofit option (?1), for the host prc ·     Value=2 for p=prc: refitted capacity in each period is forced to be equal to the retired capacity of the host prc
PRC_REFIT.affected_equations_or_variables: Activates generation of the retrofit / lifetime extension equations (EQL_REFIT)

PRC_RESID.description: Residual existing capacity stock of process (p) still available in the year specified (datayear). PRC_RESID is most useful for describing the stock of capacity with mixed vintages, while NCAP_PASTI is suited for capacities of a certain vintages, such as an individual power plants.
PRC_RESID.units_ranges_defaults: Capacity unit [0,?); default value: none Default i/e: 1 (options 5/15 may be used for extrapolation over TLIFE)
PRC_RESID.instances_conditions: If only a single data point is specified, linear decay of the specified residual capacity over technical lifetime is assumed. Used as an alternative to NCAP_PASTI, not to use both for the same process.

PRC_STGIPS.description: Set of triplets {r,p,c}such that process p is an inter-period storage for the commodity c in region r [this is a switch; >0 => YES]

PRC_STGTSS.description: Set of triplets {r,p,c}such that process p is a storage process between timeslices (e.g., seasonal hydro reservoir, day/night pumped storage) for commodity c in region r [this is a switch; >0 => YES]

Prc_PKAF.description: Set of pairs {all_r,p} such that the availability factor (ncap_af) is to be used as value for the fraction of capacity of process p that can contribute to the peaking constraints (ncap_pkcnt), in region r [this is a switch; >0 => YES]

RCAP_BLK.units_ranges_defaults: Capacity unit [0,?); default value: none Default i/e: STD
RCAP_BLK.instances_conditions: Only effective when lumpy early capacity retirements are active (RETIRE=MIP). Requires MIP.

RCAP_BND.description: Bound on the retired amount of capacity in a period (same bound for all vintages).
RCAP_BND.units_ranges_defaults: Capacity unit [0,?); default value: none Default i/e: STD
RCAP_BND.instances_conditions: Unless the control variable DSCAUTO=YES, requires that PRC_RCAP is defined for process p.

REG_BDNCAP.description: Defines the year up to which all new capacity variables should be bounded in region reg, using the previous solution (LPOINT)

REG_BNDCST.description: Bound on regional costs by type of cost aggregation.
REG_BNDCST.units_ranges_defaults: Monetary unit [0,?); default value: none Default i/e: MIG
REG_BNDCST.instances_conditions: The cost aggregations (agg) supported are listed in the set COSTAGG (see Table 1).

REG_CUMCST.description: Cumulative bound on regional costs by type of cost aggregation.
REG_CUMCST.units_ranges_defaults: Monetary unit [0,?); default value: none Default i/e: N/A
REG_CUMCST.instances_conditions: The cost aggregations (agg) supported are listed in the set COSTAGG (see Table 1).

REG_FIXT.description: Year up to which periods are fixed by period
REG_FIXT.instances_conditions: Only taken into account when the first periods are fixed by using the FIXBOH control variable.

RFCmd_DD.description: To write one line of text in <INCLUDE DD FILES> section of RUN file

RFCmd_FLAGS.description: To write one line of text in <SET FLAGS> section of RUN file

RFCmd_GAMS.description: To write one line of text in <GAMSOPTIONS> section of RUN file

RFCmd_GLOBAL.description: To write one line of text in <GLOBAL Parameters> section of RUN file

RFCmd_OPTIMIZER.description: To write one line of text in <OPTIMIZER> section of RUN file

RFCmd_bot.description: To write one line of text at the bottom of RUN file

RPT_OPT.instances_conditions: See Part III, Table 15 for a list and descriptions of available options.

R_CUREX.description: Conversion factor from currency cur1 to currency cur2 in region r, in order to use cur2 in the objective function.
R_CUREX.units_ranges_defaults: Scalar (0,?) Default value: none Default i/e: N/A
R_CUREX.instances_conditions: The target currency cur2 must have a discount rate defined with G_DRATE.

RemAtRunTime.description: Techs will be removed at RUN time (This can be used to remove techs with Stock=0, for example)

SC0.description: The investment cost corresponding to the starting point on the learning curve for a technology that ismodeled as one for which endogenous technologylearning (ETL) applies

SEG.description: The number of segments to be used in approximatingthe learning curve for a technology that is modeled asone for which endogenous technology learning (ETL)applies

SFCmd_bot.description: To write one line of text at the BOTTOM of scenario DD file

SFCmd_top.description: To write one line of text at the TOP of scenario DD file

SHAPE.description: Multiplier table used for any shaping parameters (*_*X)  to adjust the corresponding technical data as function of the age; the table can contain different multiplier curves that are identified by the index j.
SHAPE.related_sets_and_parameters: FLO_FUNC, FLO_SUM, NCAP_AFX, NCAP_FOMX, NCAP_FSUBX, NCAP_FTAXX
SHAPE.units_ranges_defaults: Scalar [open]; default value: none I/e: Full dense interpolation and extrapolation
SHAPE.instances_conditions: Provided for each age dependent shaping curve that is to be applied.

STGIN_BND.description: Bound on the input flow of a storage process in a timeslice s.
STGIN_BND.units_ranges_defaults: Commodity unit [0,?); default value: none Default i/e: MIG
STGIN_BND.instances_conditions: Only applicable to storage processes (STG): timeslice storage, inter-period storage or night storage devices.
STGIN_BND.affected_equations_or_variables: Storage input bound constraint (EQ(l)_STGIN) when s is above prc_tsl of the storage process. Direct bound on storage input flow (VAR_SIN) when at the prc_tsl level.

STGOUT_BND.description: Bound on the output flow of a storage process in a timeslice s.
STGOUT_BND.units_ranges_defaults: Commodity unit [0,?); default value: none Default i/e: MIG
STGOUT_BND.instances_conditions: Only applicable to storage processes (STG): timeslice storage, inter-period storage or night storage devices.
STGOUT_BND.affected_equations_or_variables: Storage output bound constraint (EQ(l)_STGIN) when s is above prc_tsl of the storage process. Direct bound on storage output flow variable (VAR_SOUT) when at the prc_tsl level.

STG_CHRG.description: Annual exogenous charging of a storage technology in a particular timeslice s.
STG_CHRG.units_ranges_defaults: Scalar [0,?); default value: none Default i/e: STD
STG_CHRG.instances_conditions: Only applicable to storage processes (STG): timeslice storage, inter-period storage or night storage devices.
STG_CHRG.affected_equations_or_variables: Exogenous charging of storage enters storage equations (EQ_STGTSS, EQ_STGIPS) as right-hand side constant.

STG_EFF.units_ranges_defaults: Decimal fraction [0,?); default value: 1 Default i/e: STD
STG_EFF.instances_conditions: Only applicable to storage processes (STG): timeslice storage, inter-period storage or night storage devices.
STG_EFF.affected_equations_or_variables: Applied to the storage output flow (VAR_SOUT) in the commodity balance (EQ(l)_COMBAL) for the stored commodity.

STG_LOSS.description: Annual loss of a storage process per unit of average energy stored.
STG_LOSS.units_ranges_defaults: Scalar [open]; default value: none Default i/e: STD
STG_LOSS.instances_conditions: Only applicable to storage processes (STG): timeslice storage, inter-period storage or night storage devices. STG_LOSS>0 defines the loss in proportion to the initial storage level during one year’s storage time. STG_LOSS<0 defines an equilibrium loss, i.e. how much the annual losses would be if the storage level is kept constant.
STG_LOSS.affected_equations_or_variables: Timeslice storage process (EQ_STGTSS): applied to the average storage level (VAR_ACT) between two consecutive timeslices. Inter-period storage process (EQ_STGIPS): applied to the average storage level from the pre-period (VAR_ACT) and the net inflow (VAR_SIN-VAR_SOUT) of the current period.

STG_MAXCYC.description: Defines the maximum number of storage cycles over the lifetime. Sets a limit for the total discharge divided by storage capacity.
STG_MAXCYC.units_ranges_defaults: Number of cycles [0,?); default value: none Default i/e: STD
STG_MAXCYC.instances_conditions: Can only be used for genuine storage processes. The limit can be exceeded by paying for additional replacement capacity, with a penalty cost equal to the investment annuity.
STG_MAXCYC.affected_equations_or_variables: Activates generation of the cycle limit/penalty equations (EQL_STGCCL).

STG_SIFT.description: Defines process prc as a load-shifting process, and limits the load shifting of demand com in timeslice ts to at most the fraction specified by the parameter value.
STG_SIFT.units_ranges_defaults: Decimal fraction [0,?); default value: none Default i/e: STD
STG_SIFT.instances_conditions: Can only be used for a timeslice storage process.  Levelized to the timeslice level of the process flow. Direct inheritance. By specifying com='ACT' one can define a limit in total shifting over a season, in proportion to demand.
STG_SIFT.affected_equations_or_variables: Activates generation of load shifting constraints (EQ(l)_SLSIFT).

SW_PROB.description: The total probability of each SOW at the last stage

SW_SPROB.description: The conditional probability of each sub-state at stage j

SW_START.description: The year corresponding to resolution of Uncertainty

SW_SUBS.description: The number of sub-states of the world for each SOW at stage j

S_CM_MAXC.description: Maximum level of Climate variable (upper bound) - Stochastic

S_COM_CUMNET.description: Cumulative bound on commodity net production (Absolute)

S_COM_FR.description: Non-default fraction of demand for season, time of day (Stoc)

S_DAM_COST.description: Stochastic: Marginal damage cost of emission c at reference emission level

S_UCOBJ.description: Weight coefficients for the components of the objectivefunction in the first phase of the tradeoff facility, and foreach SOW to be analyzed

S_UC_RHS.description: Stochastic: UC-RHS summed over Region, year and TS

S_UC_RHSR.description: Stochastic: UC-RHS summed over year and TS, for each region

S_UC_RHSRT.description: Stochastic: UC-RHS summed over TS, for each region and year

S_UC_RHSRTS.description: Stochastic: UC-RHS for each region, year, and TS

S_UC_RHST.description: Stochastic: UC-RHS summed over year, for each region and TS

S_UC_RHSTS.description: Stochastic: UC-RHS summed over region, for each year and TS

TM_ARBM.description: Arbitrary multiplier for the last period replication

TM_DEFVAL.description: Default values for regional Macro constants (specify under CommGrp)

TS_CYCLE.description: Defines the length of the timeslice cycles under timeslice ts, in days, and thereby also the number of timeslice cycles under each parent.
TS_CYCLE.units_ranges_defaults: Number of days [1,?); Default values:  ·  365 for ts=ANNUAL ·  7 for any ts above the WEEKLY level ·  1 for any ts above the DAYNITE level
TS_CYCLE.instances_conditions: Recommended to be used whenever timeslice cycles are different from the default, instead of changing G_CYCLE. Does not affect inter­pretation of availability factors for storage level, which thus remain to be according to G_CYCLE.
TS_CYCLE.affected_equations_or_variables: Affects the calculation of actual timeslice lengths and number of timeslice cycles in various equations, notably storage and dispatching equations.

TS_OFF.description: Set of quadruples {r,ts,y1,y2} such that the timeslice branch consisting of the timeslice ts and all the timeslices below it will not be taken into account in the model between the years y1 and y2 in region r; note that y1 may be 'BOH' for first year of first period and y2 may be 'EOH' for last year of last period. The timeslice ts specified in ts_off must be directly below ANNUAL in the timeslice tree specified (usually at the SEASON level).

UC_ACT.description: Coefficient of the activity variable VAR_ACT in a user constraint.
UC_ACT.units_ranges_defaults: None [open]; default value: none Default: i/e: STD
UC_ACT.instances_conditions: Used in user constraints. Direct inheritance. Weighted aggregation.

UC_ATTR.description: Allows modifiers to be applied to the variables used in the UC

UC_CAP.description: Coefficient of the activity variable VAR_CAP in a user constraint.
UC_CAP.units_ranges_defaults: None [open]; default value: none Default: i/e: STD

UC_CLI.description: Multiplier of climate variable in user constraint
UC_CLI.units_ranges_defaults: Dimensionless [open]; default value: none Default i/e: STD
UC_CLI.instances_conditions: Used in user constraints. Climate variable can be at least any of CO2-GTC, CO2-ATM, CO2-UP, CO2-LO, FORCING, DELTA-ATM, DELTA-LO (for carbon). See Appendix on Climate Module for details.

UC_COMCON.description: Coefficient of the commodity consumption variable VAR_COMCON in a user constraint.
UC_COMCON.units_ranges_defaults: None [open]; default value: none Default: i/e: STD
UC_COMCON.instances_conditions: Used in user constraints. No inheritance/aggregation (might be changed in the future).

UC_COMNET.description: UC Multiplier for Net commodity availability

UC_COMPRD.description: Coefficient of the net commodity production variable VAR_COMPRD in a user constraint.
UC_COMPRD.units_ranges_defaults: None [open]; default value: none Default: i/e: STD
UC_COMPRD.instances_conditions: Used in user constraints. No inheritance/aggregation (might be changed in the future).

UC_CUMACT.description: Multiplier of cumulative process activity variable in user constraint.
UC_CUMACT.units_ranges_defaults: Dimensionless [open]; default value: none I/e: N/A
UC_CUMACT.instances_conditions: Used in cumulative user constraints only.

UC_CUMCOM.description: Multiplier of cumulative commodity variable in user constraint.
UC_CUMCOM.units_ranges_defaults: Dimensionless [open]; default value: none I/e: N/A
UC_CUMCOM.instances_conditions: Used in cumulative user constraints only. Type=NET/PRD determines the variable referred to (CUMNET/ CUMPRD).

UC_CUMFLO.description: Multiplier of cumulative process flow variable in user constraint.
UC_CUMFLO.units_ranges_defaults: Dimensionless [open]; default value: none I/e: N/A
UC_CUMFLO.instances_conditions: Used in cumulative user constraints only.

UC_FLO.description: Coefficient of the flow VAR_FLO variable in a user constraint.
UC_FLO.units_ranges_defaults: None [open]; default value: none Default: i/e: STD
UC_FLO.instances_conditions: Used in user constraints. Direct inheritance. Weighted aggregation.

UC_IRE.description: Coefficient of the trade variable VAR_IRE in a user constraint.
UC_IRE.units_ranges_defaults: None [open]; default value: none Default: i/e: STD
UC_IRE.instances_conditions: Used in user constraints. Direct inheritance. Weighted aggregation.

UC_IRE-E.description: UC Multiplier for IRE variables - Export

UC_IRE-I.description: UC Multiplier for IRE variables - Import

UC_NCAP.description: Coefficient of the activity variable VAR_NCAP in a user constraint.
UC_NCAP.units_ranges_defaults: None [open]; default value: none Default: i/e: STD

UC_RHS.description: RHS constant with bound type of bd of a user constraint.
UC_RHS.units_ranges_defaults: None [open]; default value: none Default i/e: none
UC_RHS.instances_conditions: Used in user constraints. Binding user constraints are defined using bound types lim=UP/LO/FX. Non-binding (free) user constraints can be defined using the lim type lim=N.
UC_RHS.affected_equations_or_variables: RHS (right-hand side) constant of a user constraint, which is summing over regions (uc_r_sum), periods (uc_t_sum) and timeslices (uc_ts_sum) (EQ(l)_UC).

UC_RHSR.description: RHS constant with bound type of bd of a user constraint.
UC_RHSR.units_ranges_defaults: None [open]; default value: none Default i/e: none
UC_RHSR.instances_conditions: Used in user constraints.  Binding user constraints are defined using bound types lim=UP/LO/FX. Non-binding (free) user constraints can be defined using the lim type lim=N.
UC_RHSR.affected_equations_or_variables: RHS constant of user constraints, which are generated for each specified region (uc_r_each) and are summing over periods (uc_t_sum) and timeslices (uc_ts_sum) (EQ(l)_UCR).

UC_RHSRS.description: UC-RHS summed over year, for each region and TS

UC_RHSRT.description: RHS constant with bound type of bd of a user constraint.
UC_RHSRT.units_ranges_defaults: None [open]; default value: none Default i/e: MIG
UC_RHSRT.instances_conditions: Used in user constraints.  Binding user constraints are defined using bound types lim=UP/LO/FX. Non-binding (free) user constraints can be defined using the lim type lim=N.
UC_RHSRT.affected_equations_or_variables: RHS constant of user constraints, which are generated for each specified region (uc_r_each) and period (uc_t_each) and are summing over timeslices (uc_ts_sum) (EQ(l)_UCRT). If uc_t_succ instead of uc_t_each is specified the constraints will be generated as dynamic constraint between the two successive periods (EQ(l)_UCRSU).

UC_RHSRTS.description: RHS constant with bound type of bd of a user constraint.
UC_RHSRTS.units_ranges_defaults: None [open]; default value: none Default i/e: MIG
UC_RHSRTS.instances_conditions: Used in user constraints. No inheritance / aggregation, unless the target timeslice level is specified by UC_TSL. Direct inheritance, if the target timeslice level is specified by UC_TSL.  Binding user constraints are defined using bound types lim=UP/LO/FX. Non-binding (free) user constraints can be defined using the lim type lim=N.
UC_RHSRTS.affected_equations_or_variables: RHS constant of user constraints, which are generated for each specified region (uc_r_each), period (uc_t_each) and timeslice (uc_ts_each) (EQ(l)_UCRTS). If uc_t_succ instead of uc_t_each is specified the constraints will be generated as dynamic constraint between the two successive periods (EQ(l)_UCRSUS).

UC_RHSS.description: UC-RHS summed over region and year, for each TS

UC_RHST.description: RHS constant with bound type of bd of a user constraint.
UC_RHST.units_ranges_defaults: None [open]; default value: none Default i/e: MIG
UC_RHST.instances_conditions: Used in user constraints.  Binding user constraints are defined using bound types lim=UP/LO/FX. Non-binding (free) user constraints can be defined using the lim type lim=N.
UC_RHST.affected_equations_or_variables: RHS constant of user constraints, which are generated for each specified period (uc_t_each) and are summing over regions (uc_r_sum) and timeslices (uc_ts_sum) (EQ(l)_UCT). If uc_t_succ instead of uc_t_each is specified the constraints will be generated as dynamic constraint between the two successive periods (EQ(l)_UCSU).

UC_RHSTS.description: RHS constant with bound type of bd of a user constraint.
UC_RHSTS.units_ranges_defaults: None [open]; default value: none Default i/e: MIG
UC_RHSTS.instances_conditions: Used in user constraints. No inheritance/aggregation.  Binding user constraints are defined using bound types lim=UP/LO/FX. Non-binding (free) user constraints can be defined using the lim type lim=N.
UC_RHSTS.affected_equations_or_variables: RHS constant of user constraints, which are generated for each specified period (uc_t_each) and timeslice (uc_ts_each) and are summing over regions (uc_r_sum) (EQ(l)_UCTS). If uc_t_succ instead of uc_t_each is specified the constraints will be generated as dynamic constraint between the two successive periods (EQ(l)_UCSUS).

UC_TIME.description: Multiplier for the number of years in model periods (static UCs), or between milestone years (dynamic UCs)
UC_TIME.units_ranges_defaults: Dimensionless [open]; default value: none Default i/e: STD
UC_TIME.instances_conditions: Used in user constraints. Adds a time constant to the RHS side.

UC_UCN.description: Multiplier of user constraint variable in another user constraint.
UC_UCN.units_ranges_defaults: Dimensionless [open]; default value: none Default i/e: STD
UC_UCN.instances_conditions: Only taken into account if the user constraint is by region & period, and summing over timeslices and the RHS side is activated (EQ(l)_UCRSU).

VA_Attrib_C.description: Generic Attribute for FILL Tables  - Comm

VA_Attrib_T.description: Generic Attribute for FILL Tables - Tech

VA_Attrib_TC.description: Generic Attribute for FILL Tables  - Tech+Comm

VA_HOUSECOOLTARGET.description: VA: Share of houses with cooling in the long run

VA_HOUSESHCOOL.description: VA: Share of Houses with cooling

VA_HSCLTRGTYEARS.description: VA: Years it will take to get to the long run cooling share

VDA_CEH.description: Ratio of electricity lost to heat gained

VDA_EMCB.description: Emissions (com) from the combustion of commodity (c) in region (r).
VDA_EMCB.units_ranges_defaults: Emission units per flow units default value: none Default i/e: STD
VDA_EMCB.instances_conditions: Available in the VEDA shell. Any process-specific FLO_EMIS / FLO_EFF with the commodities c and com will override VDA_EMCB.

tm_expbnd.description: Maximum expansion bound for capacity; used for the cumulated capacity bound tm_captb, above which the penalty is to be applied for new investments in a technology

tm_gdp0.description: Gross domestic product in first period

tm_gr.description: Projected annual GDP growth in period t

tm_ivetol.description: Used as upper bound on the investment and energy in equation EQ_IVECBND; also provides lower bound for the capital variable

tm_kpvs.description: Share of capital in the sum of all production factors in first period

tm_qfac.description: Switch for market penetration penalty function

tm_scale_cst.description: Cost scaling parameter from TIMES costs to MACRO costs

tm_scale_nrg.description: Demand scaling parameter from TIMES demand commodity units to MACRO demand units
